phases.title: MCP Security Foundation
phases.goal: MCP config, listener guard, capability, webhook key security contracts를 먼저 테스트로 고정하고 구현한다.

phases.title: Session Registry And Alias
phases.goal: stable sessionKey, runtime sessionId binding, alias/list/search/backfill을 구현한다.

phases.title: MCP Transport And Tool Surface
phases.goal: `/mcp` Streamable HTTP adapter와 core tool service를 구현한다.

phases.title: Agent Launch And Close Lifecycle
phases.goal: MCP-launched follower session, claim/kickoff, close/self-close compensation을 구현한다.

phases.title: Webhook And Control REST
phases.goal: webhook assignment와 browser-admin control REST contract를 구현한다.

phases.title: Tools Dialog UI
phases.goal: MCP management dialog, security whitelist tab, webhook/profile/session tabs를 구현한다.

phases.title: Edge Hardening And Review
phases.goal: final wire-contract precedence, integration/manual verification, strict review를 완료한다.

tasks.title: Security contract red tests
tasks.action: Add failing tests for loopback default, whitelist TLS/proxy rejection, trusted forwarded IP handling, browser JWT rejection, scoped token claims, webhook key entropy/hash storage, and stable denial codes.
dod: Red tests cover SEC-MCP-001 AC-1..AC-6, SEC-MCP-002 AC-1..AC-9, and IR-MCP-005 security precedence.
tasks.rollback: Revert only added MCP security tests.

tasks.title: Security foundation implementation
tasks.action: Add MCP config/types, listener guard helpers, capability token validation, webhook key hashing/rotation primitives, redaction helpers, and denial code constants.
dod: MCP security boundary is separate from browser JWT auth and rejects unsafe whitelist modes.
tasks.rollback: Disable MCP listener startup and remove new MCP security modules.

tasks.title: Registry and alias red tests
tasks.action: Add failing tests for sessionKey creation, currentSessionId generation updates, stale sessionId rejection, includeSelf list behavior, exact alias search ranking, alias update broadcast, startup reconcile, and legacy tab backfill.
dod: Tests prove runtime sessionId remains UUID while sessionKey survives restart/orphan recovery.

tasks.title: Registry and alias implementation
tasks.action: Add Workspace/MCP session binding service, sessionKey fields, restart/orphan reconciliation, list/search/set_alias service methods, and tab update broadcasts.
dod: User-renamed status-bar/tab alias is the primary MCP alias and MCP alias changes persist through WorkspaceTab.name with nameSource user.
tasks.rollback: Remove registry service integration and preserve existing WorkspaceTab sessionId behavior.

tasks.title: Input gateway red tests
tasks.action: Add failing tests proving WebSocket input, restore input, MCP message send, reply_to_leader, webhook delivery, and open_agent kickoff all enter SessionInputGateway and preserve replay rejection, paste/submit policy, stale target rejection, and AI TUI idle invariant.
dod: Red tests include INPUT_REJECTED_REPLAY_PENDING and IR-MCP-005 final error-code precedence.

tasks.title: Input gateway implementation
tasks.action: Introduce SessionInputGateway and replay-state adapter, move WebSocket and restore input behind it, and expose MCP/webhook input submission APIs without changing low-level PTY write semantics.
dod: User typing/local echo/prompt redraw still keeps AI TUI sessions idle unless substantive command output occurs.
tasks.rollback: Route WebSocket/restore input back to previous direct SessionManager.writeInput path.

tasks.title: MCP transport and tool red tests
tasks.action: Add failing integration tests for `/mcp` tools/list, tools/call, whoami, session.list/search/set_alias, message.send, update_status, audit ids, and listener rebind health/rollback.
dod: Tests cover contract errors without logging tokens, keys, or raw prompt material.

tasks.title: MCP transport and tool implementation
tasks.action: Add MCP HTTP controller/adapter, McpToolService, audit/status recording, listener rebind controller, and startup wiring independent from app HTTPS server restart.
dod: Default listener binds loopback, external access is denied unless whitelist+TLS policy passes, and tool failures produce stable codes.
tasks.rollback: Disable MCP listener wiring and remove endpoint registration.

tasks.title: Agent lifecycle red tests
tasks.action: Add failing tests for agent profile validation/import, open_agent env/config injection, claim/kickoff, launch compensation cleanup, close target routing through deleteTab, and deferred close_self notification.
dod: Red tests prove spawned follower receives sessionKey/leaderSessionKey and generated config cleanup occurs on failure.

tasks.title: Agent lifecycle implementation
tasks.action: Add AgentCommandProfileService, open_agent workflow, launch-attempt persistence, claim/update_status support, kickoff via SessionInputGateway, deleteTab-based close, and post-response close_self deferral.
dod: Failed launch leaves no leaked tab, token, generated config file, or process; close errors remain auditable.
tasks.rollback: Disable open_agent and close MCP tools while preserving registry/list/search.

tasks.title: Webhook and control REST red tests
tasks.action: Add failing tests for webhook query/header key invocation, target alias resolution, no-target open_or_send mode, redaction/rate limit, MCP control config/profile/webhook/session routes, close confirmation, reply-test, rotate/revoke/list edge cases, and conflict validation.
dod: Red tests cover query/header conflict, one-time full secret exposure, masked list responses, and stable denial codes.

tasks.title: Webhook and control REST implementation
tasks.action: Add webhook capability store/routes, assignment invocation service, MCP control REST routes, mcpControlApi types/client methods, and masked/one-time credential response handling.
dod: Browser-admin REST auth remains separate from MCP runtime actor auth; webhook secrets are never returned after create/rotate.
tasks.rollback: Disable webhook and MCP control REST route mounts while leaving core MCP tools intact.

tasks.title: Tools dialog red tests
tasks.action: Add failing UI/unit tests in the existing runtimeConfig test harness for Tools menu entry, MCP dialog tabs, security whitelist validation errors, config rebind status, agent profile CRUD, webhook one-time/masked secret display, live session search/alias/reply-test/close confirmation, and final precedence labels.
dod: Red tests assert whitelist settings are exposed in Tools dialog security tab, not generic Settings page.

tasks.title: Tools dialog implementation
tasks.action: Add McpSessionControlDialog and tabs for server/security, agent profiles, webhook keys, live sessions, audit/status, plus Header/App wiring and typed API client integration while preserving the existing Tools/WindowDialog visual pattern.

acceptance_tests.cmd: cd frontend; node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/unit/runtimeConfig.test.ts; npm run build

verification_cmd.posix: cd frontend && node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/unit/runtimeConfig.test.ts && npm run build
verification_cmd.windows: cd frontend; node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/unit/runtimeConfig.test.ts; npm run build

dod: UI shows validation/status without exposing raw tokens, keys, prompts, or browser JWTs.
tasks.rollback: Remove MCP dialog route/wiring and keep backend MCP control APIs disabled from UI.

tasks.title: Integration and manual validation
tasks.action: Run integration checks for MCP tools/list/tools/call, loopback access, whitelist allow/deny, session list/search/alias, paste-only message send, reply_to_leader, webhook assignment, Tools dialog flows, audit redaction, and listener rebind rollback.

items: Integration report records automated command outputs and manual validation against https://localhost:2222 where browser UI behavior is required.

dod: No requirement is claimed implemented without corresponding automated or manual evidence.
tasks.rollback: Disable MCP feature flag or listener wiring if integration validation fails.

tdd.exempt_reason: Review task verifies completed implementation evidence rather than adding code.

tasks.title: Final regression and sub-agent review
tasks.action: Run full server tests, focused/full frontend checks as practical, SpecKiwi validation, security redaction scan, and strict sub-agent review against SRS and plan.

items: Final reviewer returns No findings or all findings are fixed and re-reviewed.

dod: CRITICAL/HIGH review findings are zero and final report lists exact commands, skipped checks, and residual risks.
tasks.rollback: Revert MCP listener/control-plane wiring or gate it off if final review finds unsafe behavior.

tdd.exempt_reason: Review task verifies completed implementation evidence rather than adding code.

risks.description: MCP, webhook, and browser authentication boundaries can be confused.
risks.mitigation: Add denial-code and redaction regression tests before implementation.

risks.description: SessionInputGateway can regress replay handling and AI TUI idle invariants.
risks.mitigation: Preserve existing WebSocket replay/input tests and add gateway-specific red tests first.

risks.description: close_self can terminate its own response channel before the MCP response flushes.
risks.mitigation: Defer self-close until after response flush and record failed deferred jobs.

risks.description: UI may expose token, key, or prompt material.
risks.mitigation: Use masked list responses and one-time full secret display only.
